parameter.name: hdlParameters
parameter.value: <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinitionList> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>The width of the AWADDR and ARADDR signals (see AMBA AXI and ACE Protocol Specification IHI0022H section A2.2).</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>ADDR_WIDTH</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>23</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>The width of the DATA signal (see AMBA AXI and ACE Protocol Specification IHI0022H section A2.6).</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>DATA_WIDTH</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>32</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>The width of the AWID, ARID, RID and BID signals (see AMBA AXI and ACE Protocol Specification IHI0022H section A2.2).</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>ID_WIDTH</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>4</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>The width of the AWUSER, ARUSER, WUSER, RUSER and BUSER signals (see AMBA AXI and ACE Protocol Specification IHI0022H section A8.3).</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>USER_WIDTH</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>32</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Maximum Number of Outstanding Reads</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>RD_ISSUING_CAPABILITY</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>16</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Maximum Number of Outstanding Writes</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>WR_ISSUING_CAPABILITY</parameterName> Transactions</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>COMBINED_ISSUING_CAPABILITY</parameterName> signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_AWID</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable AWREGION parameter.name: hdlParameters
parameter.value: <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinitionList> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>The width of the AWADDR and ARADDR signals (see AMBA AXI and ACE Protocol Specification IHI0022H section A2.2).</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>ADDR_WIDTH</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>20</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>The width of the DATA signal (see AMBA AXI and ACE Protocol Specification IHI0022H section A2.6).</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>DATA_WIDTH</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>256</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>The width of the AWID, ARID, RID and BID signals (see AMBA AXI and ACE Protocol Specification IHI0022H section A2.2).</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>ID_WIDTH</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>4</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>The width of the AWUSER, ARUSER, WUSER, RUSER and BUSER signals (see AMBA AXI and ACE Protocol Specification IHI0022H section A8.3).</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>USER_WIDTH</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>32</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Maximum Number of Outstanding parameter.name: componentDefinition
parameter.value: <componentDefinition> <boundary> <interfaces> <interface> <name>altera_axi4_subordinate</name> <type>axi4</type> <isStart>false</isStart> <ports> <port> <name>awlen</name> <role>awlen</role> <direction>Input</direction> <width>8</width> <lowerBound>0</lowerBound> <vhdlType>STD_LOGIC_VECTOR</vhdlType> <terminationValue>0</terminationValue> </port> <port> <name>awsize</name> <role>awsize</role> <direction>Input</direction> <width>3</width> <lowerBound>0</lowerBound> <vhdlType>STD_LOGIC_VECTOR</vhdlType> <terminationValue>0</terminationValue> </port> <port> <name>awburst</name> <role>awburst</role> <direction>Input</direction> <width>2</width> <lowerBound>0</lowerBound> <vhdlType>STD_LOGIC_VECTOR</vhdlType> <terminationValue>0</terminationValue> </port> <port> <name>awvalid</name> <role>awvalid</role> <direction>Input</direction> <width>1</width> <lowerBound>0</lowerBound> <vhdlType>STD_LOGIC</vhdlType> <terminationValue>0</terminationValue> </port> <port> <name>awlock</name> <role>awlock</role> <direction>Input</direction> <width>1</width> <lowerBound>0</lowerBound> <vhdlType>STD_LOGIC</vhdlType> <terminationValue>0</terminationValue> </port> <port> <name>awregion</name> <role>awregion</role> <direction>Input</direction> <width>4</width> <lowerBound>0</lowerBound> <vhdlType>STD_LOGIC_VECTOR</vhdlType> <terminationValue>0</terminationValue> </port> <port> <name>awprot</name> <role>awprot</role> <direction>Input</direction> <width>3</width> <lowerBound>0</lowerBound> <vhdlType>STD_LOGIC_VECTOR</vhdlType> <terminationValue>0</terminationValue> </port> <port> <name>awready</name> <role>awready</role> <direction>Output</direction> <width>1</width> <lowerBound>0</lowerBound> <vhdlType>STD_LOGIC_VECTOR</vhdlType> <terminationValue>0</terminationValue> </port> <port> <name>arsize</name> <role>arsize</role> <direction>Input</direction> </port> </ports> <assignments> <assignmentValueMap/> </assignments> <parameters> <parameterValueMap> <entry> <key>associatedClock</key> <value>clock_sink</value> </entry> <entry> <key>associatedReset</key> <value>reset_sink</value> </entry> <entry> <key>optionalAssociatedReset</key> <value>false</value> </entry> <entry> <key>trustzoneAware</key> <value>true</value> </entry> <entry> <key>wakeupSignals</key> <value>false</value> </entry> <entry> <key>uniqueIdSupport</key> <value>false</value> </entry> <entry> <key>poison</key> <value>false</value> </entry> <entry> <key>traceSignals</key> <value>false</value> </entry> <entry> <key>isTranslator</key> <value>false</value> </entry> <entry> <key>maximumOutstandingReads</key> <value>1</value> </entry> <entry> <key>maximumOutstandingWrites</key> <value>1</value> </entry> <entry> <key>maximumOutstandingTransactions</key> <value>1</value> </entry> <entry> <key>dataCheck</key> <value>false</value> </entry> <entry> <key>addressCheck</key> <value>false</value> </entry> <entry> <key>securityAttribute</key> <value>false</value> </entry> <entry> <key>userData</key> <value>false</value> </entry> <entry> <key>readAcceptanceCapability</key> <value>1</value> </entry> <entry> <key>writeAcceptanceCapability</key> <value>1</value> </entry> <entry> <key>combinedAcceptanceCapability</key> <value>1</value> </entry> <entry> <key>readDataReorderingDepth</key> <value>1</value> </entry> <entry> <key>bridgesToMaster</key> </entry> <entry> <key>dfhFeatureGuid</key> <value>0</value> </entry> <entry> <key>dfhGroupId</key> <value>0</value> </entry> <entry> <key>dfhParameterId</key> </entry> <entry> <key>dfhParameterName</key> </entry> <entry> <key>dfhParameterVersion</key> </entry> <entry> <value>0</value> </entry> <entry> <key>dfhFeatureId</key> <value>35</value> </entry> <entry> <key>dfhFeatureType</key> <value>3</value> </entry> <entry> <key>noNarrowTransfer</key> <value>false</value> </entry> </parameterValueMap> </parameters> </interface> <interface> <name>clock_sink</name> <type>clock</type> <isStart>false</isStart> <ports> <port> <name>clk</name> <key>ptfSchematicName</key> </entry> </parameterValueMap> </parameters> </interface> <interface> <name>reset_sink</name> <type>reset</type> <isStart>false</isStart> <ports> <port> <name>rstn</name> <role>reset_n</role> <direction>Input</direction> <width>1</width> <lowerBound>0</lowerBound> <vhdlType>STD_LOGIC</vhdlType> <terminationValue>0</terminationValue> </port> </ports> <assignments> </entry> </parameterValueMap> </parameters> </interface> </interfaces> </boundary> <originalModuleInfo> <className>altera_axi4_mm_subordinate_intf</className> <version>2024.0.1</version> <displayName>AXI4 Subordinate BFM</displayName> </originalModuleInfo> <systemInfoParameterDescriptors> <descriptors/> </systemInfoParameterDescriptors> <systemInfos> <connPtSystemInfos> <entry> <key>altera_axi4_subordinate</key> <value> <connectionPointName>altera_axi4_subordinate</connectionPointName> <suppliedSystemInfos> <entry> <key>ADDRESS_MAP</key> <value><address-map><slave name='altera_axi4_subordinate' start='0x0' end='0x100000' datawidth='256' /></address-map></value> </entry> <entry> <key>ADDRESS_WIDTH</key> <value>20</value> </entry> <entry> <key>MAX_SLAVE_DATA_WIDTH</key> <value>256</value> </entry> </suppliedSystemInfos> <consumedSystemInfos/> </value> </entry> </connPtSystemInfos> </systemInfos> </componentDefinition>

parameter.name: hdlParameters
parameter.value: <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinitionList> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>The width of the AWADDR and ARADDR signals (see AMBA AXI and ACE Protocol Specification IHI0022H section A2.2).</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>ADDR_WIDTH</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>20</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>The width of the DATA signal (see AMBA AXI and ACE Protocol Specification IHI0022H section A2.6).</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>DATA_WIDTH</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>256</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>The width of the AWID, ARID, RID and BID signals (see AMBA AXI and ACE Protocol Specification IHI0022H section A2.2).</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>ID_WIDTH</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>5</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>The width of the AWUSER, ARUSER, WUSER, RUSER and BUSER signals (see AMBA AXI and ACE Protocol Specification IHI0022H section A8.3).</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>USER_WIDTH</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>32</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Maximum Number of Outstanding Reads</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>RD_ACCEPTANCE_CAPABILITY</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>16</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Maximum Number of Outstanding Writes</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>WR_ACCEPTANCE_CAPABILITY</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>16</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Maximum Number of Outstanding Transactions</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>COMBINED_ACCEPTANCE_CAPABILITY</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>16</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable AWREGION signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_AWREGION</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable AWLOCK signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_AWLOCK</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable AWCACHE signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_AWCACHE</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable AWQOS signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_AWQOS</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable AWPROT signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_AWPROT</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable WLAST signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_WLAST</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable BRESP signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_BRESP</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable ARREGION signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_ARREGION</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable ARLOCK signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_ARLOCK</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable ARCACHE signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_ARCACHE</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable ARQOS signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_ARQOS</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable ARPROT signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_ARPROT</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable RRESP signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_RRESP</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable AWUSER signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_AWUSER</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable ARUSER signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_ARUSER</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable WUSER signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_WUSER</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable RUSER signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_RUSER</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Enable BUSER signal</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterHdlWidth></parameterHdlWidth> <parameterName>USE_BUSER</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinitionList>

parameter.name: hdlParameters
parameter.value: <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinitionList> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Reset is active high when this value is set to 1</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>ASSERT_HIGH_RESET</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>1</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> <description>Automatically reset for specified number of cycles at the initial of simulation</description> <enabled>true</enabled> <exported>false</exported> <parameterHdlType>INTEGER</parameterHdlType> <parameterName>INITIAL_RESET_CYCLES</parameterName> <parameterType>java.lang.Integer</parameterType> <parameterValue>0</parameterValue> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinition> </hdlParameterDescriptorDefinitionList>

parameter.name: MERLIN_PACKET_FORMAT
parameter.value: dataless(480) mmusecsid(479) mmusid(478) awstashlpiden(477) awstashlpid(476:472) awstashniden(471) awstashnid(470:460) awatop(459:454) awakeup(453) trace(452) atrace(451) trans_seq(450) sop_ooo(449) eop_ooo(448) sai(447) addrchk(446:445) user_data(444) datachk(443) poison(442) wunique(441) domain(440:439) snoop(438:435) barrier(434:433) ori_burst_size(432:430) response_status(429:428) cache(427:424) protection(423:421) thread_id(420:417) dest_id(416) src_id(415) qos(414:411) begin_burst(410) data_sideband(409:378) addr_sideband(377:346) burst_type(345:344) burst_size(343:341) burstwrap(340:331) byte_cnt(330:317) trans_exclusive(316) trans_lock(315) trans_read(314) trans_write(313) trans_posted(312) trans_compressed_read(311) addr(310:288) byteen(287:256) data(255:0)

parameter.name: OUT_MERLIN_PACKET_FORMAT
parameter.value: dataless(228) mmusecsid(227) mmusid(226) awstashlpiden(225) awstashlpid(224:220) awstashniden(219) awstashnid(218:208) awatop(207:202) awakeup(201) trace(200) atrace(199) trans_seq(198) sop_ooo(197) eop_ooo(196) sai(195) addrchk(194:193) user_data(192) datachk(191) poison(190) wunique(189) domain(188:187) snoop(186:183) barrier(182:181) ori_burst_size(180:178) response_status(177:176) cache(175:172) protection(171:169) thread_id(168:165) dest_id(164) src_id(163) qos(162:159) begin_burst(158) data_sideband(157:126) addr_sideband(125:94) burst_type(93:92) burst_size(91:89) burstwrap(88:79) byte_cnt(78:65) trans_exclusive(64) trans_lock(63) trans_read(62) trans_write(61) trans_posted(60) trans_compressed_read(59) addr(58:36) byteen(35:32) data(31:0)

parameter.name: IN_MERLIN_PACKET_FORMAT
parameter.value: dataless(480) mmusecsid(479) mmusid(478) awstashlpiden(477) awstashlpid(476:472) awstashniden(471) awstashnid(470:460) awatop(459:454) awakeup(453) trace(452) atrace(451) trans_seq(450) sop_ooo(449) eop_ooo(448) sai(447) addrchk(446:445) user_data(444) datachk(443) poison(442) wunique(441) domain(440:439) snoop(438:435) barrier(434:433) ori_burst_size(432:430) response_status(429:428) cache(427:424) protection(423:421) thread_id(420:417) dest_id(416) src_id(415) qos(414:411) begin_burst(410) data_sideband(409:378) addr_sideband(377:346) burst_type(345:344) burst_size(343:341) burstwrap(340:331) byte_cnt(330:317) trans_exclusive(316) trans_lock(315) trans_read(314) trans_write(313) trans_posted(312) trans_compressed_read(311) addr(310:288) byteen(287:256) data(255:0)

parameter.name: OUT_MERLIN_PACKET_FORMAT
